name: dibs
description: Single-occupancy lock for a working directory: a vendor-neutral, cross-platform CLI so only one coding agent occupies a directory at a time. claim/release/check on an atomic exclusive-create lockfile keyed by realpath, with pid-based liveness that self-heals a dead holder and respects a live one. No flock, no native dependency. bonsai and the discipline hooks consume it.

No flock, no native dependency. bonsai and the discipline hooks consume it.
